chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-6326/2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 13.01.2025 Associate of Mr. Ibrahim Abro advocate for petitioner. Pir Riaz Muhammad Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. Jan Muhammad Khuro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. SI Tayyab, FIA Immigration, JIAP, Karachi and SIP Sikandar Ali, PS Airport................ Compliance report filed by the police officer is taken on record. Counsel contends that missing person has returned home. Petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E IK
